lines.speaker: Macklin
lines.text: Hey techie, what on earth is going on here?

lines.speaker: Macklin
lines.text: Yeah, yeah, I get that, but how does it get fixed?

lines.speaker: Injured Scientist
lines.text: Need to...reset...levers on console...in proper order...

lines.speaker: Macklin
lines.text: Reset the levers, got it. How do I know what position the levers need to be in?

lines.speaker: Macklin
lines.text: Listen to the lights and levers? That doesn’t make any sense...

lines.speaker: Macklin
lines.text: I still don’t know what you mean by listen to the lights...

lines.speaker: Macklin
lines.text: Great, he’s out cold. Guess I gotta “listen to the lights”, whatever the hell that means...
